ENEMY_MISC_ANGELORUM_DESC: The Sun Corporation is proud to present its newest attempt at the creation of a Chorus Inversus. Using parts salvaged from captured Chorus Inversus in collaboration with the newest version of our OS to assist in control, this newest Angelorum continues our plans towards the final version.
ENEMY_MISC_ANGELORUM_EXTRA: Despite future intent, currently useless for all but research and entertainment.
ENEMY_MISC_MUTUS_DESC: While creating the Angelorum, the Sun Corporation also performed unsuccessful experimentations with Detritus. Project cancelled due to difficulty finding intellectual subjects, remaining subjects are released for training use to free up storage space.
ENEMY_MISC_MUTUS_EXTRA: Beta 1.0e - PROJECT CANCELLED. Disable and return all creations to your nearest floor manager.
ENEMY_MISC_SCLERA_DESC: Research difficult due to murderous intent, The eyes seem to be attached to an unseeable creature due to its immense radar presence. First contact ended with researcher being pulled into the iris and never returning.
ENEMY_MISC_SCLERA_EXTRA: Keep P.A.D ready in confirmed activity areas. Avoid at all costs.
ENEMY_MISC_LATENSMANUS_DESC: These small hands were the first to appear after the landing of the Monolith, quickly spreading throughout the tunnels at the cost of other small life forms, essentially harmless but has been known to nibble on somebody not looking.
ENEMY_MISC_LATENSMANUS_EXTRA: Commonly referred to as Rats due to the noises they make. We assume they 'ate' them.
ENEMY_MISC_PRAEMIATOR_DESC: This curious Errata seems to be of no particular side, but seems attracted to 'shiny' objects, first found in the offices during a late shift hunting through desks for pocket change. The Sun Corporation requests all findings are logged and any stolen Sun Corporation property is returned in return for a small reward.
ENEMY_MISC_PRAEMIATOR_EXTRA: Are your co-workers unlawful? As per all employee contracts, The Sun Corporation has a strict immediate dismissal rule for any employee stealing, or assisting a co-worker in any illicit activities.
ENEMY_MISC_TRIACAMPANAE_DESC: 3 small balls with wings, they surround a player and create a damaging ring, they each need to be killed to remove it
ENEMY_MISC_IDOLUMSANGUINE_DESC: A flying statue of a head weeping blood
ENEMY_MISC_MASSADIVINA_DESC: Immensely sized creatures that call the end of times
ENEMY_MISC_SOL_DESC: An immense ball of pure light
ENEMY_MISC_CLUTCHMIST_DESC: A puff of dark mist, reaches out for the player with many hands
ENEMY_MISC_FRACTIS_DESC: A creature that will split in half when killed
ENEMY_MISC_INEVITABLISOBEX_DESC: A colossal, spectral figure that appears when someone's greed reaches its peak.
ENEMY_MISC_MASKWRAITH_DESC: Floating masks will go for the biosphere, but as soon as one is attacked all masks will swarm that player. The masks whisper madness.
ENEMY_MISC_SEGMENTOR_DESC: A long creature with multiple sections that look aimlessly in multiple directions, each section is capable of attacking a different object
